H442/H462 split-pool canary VERDICT: split fix worked for its target modes (conn_errors 0 vs 2 pre-split; budget_kill_switch_tripped FALSE; pools held translate 10/34, heal 56/125, neither tripped) BUT 0/12 clean STILL.
